The '''''Unlimited Projection''''' was a heavily converted [[Core ship/Legends|core ship]].

==Characteristics==
Originally a [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] [[Core ship/Legends|core ship]], the ''Unlimited Projection'' was heavily modified by the time it was utilized as a command center. Unlike a standard core ship, the station possessed several large antenna's protruding from both the top and bottom of the vessel. These would be used to keep in constant communication with [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] forces spread across [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].

Internally, the station contained [[Hangar/Legends|landing bays]] that possessed enough space to accommodate [[Vulture-class starfighter/Legends|Vulture droid starfighters]] and [[Rogue-class Porax-38 starfighter/Legends|''Rogue''-class starfighters]].

==History==
The ''Unlimited Projection'' was used during the Separatist occupation of [[Utapau/Legends|Utapau]] in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], when the ship landed in [[Pau City/Legends|Pau City]] with the majority of the Confederate armada.

The ship served as both a command center for [[General/Legends|General]] [[Grievous/Legends|Grievous]] and a [[Droid/Legends|droid]] factory for the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] on [[Utapau/Legends|Utapau]]. It was ten stories tall and was guarded by at least two [[Anti-aircraft gun|anti-craft turrets]]. It also served as a Droid control ship, being equipped with a Droid Control antennae and several [[ATX energy pillar]]s to power the massive droid occupation forces.

[[File:Grievous-and-his-army.png|thumb|left|250px|Grievous and his [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]] before the Battle of Utapau]]
It was infiltrated by [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], who engaged General Grievous in [[Hangar 10/Legends|Hangar 10]] before a detachment of [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]], led by [[Clone Marshal Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Cody/Legends|Cody]], [[Battle of Utapau/Legends|attacked]] the Separatist forces.<ref name="EpisodeIII" /> The ship was seized by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] at the conclusion of the battle and was later used as an Imperial station.
